summary: Beautifully presented two bedroom apartment - Top (2nd) floor in a private purpose built block with communal garden - Wooden flooring throughout - Reception with an abundance of natural light - Modern kitchen/diner with premium brand appliances - Spacious master bedroom - Second doubl...
feesApplyText: PARKHEATH TENANT FEE SCHEDULE FOR ASSURED PERIODIC TENANCIES Holding Deposit (per tenancy) One week’s rent to reserve a property. This may be withheld if any relevant person (including guarantors) withdraws, fails a Right to Rent check, provides false or misleading information, or fails to sign the tenancy agreement and/or Deed of Guarantee within 15 calendar days (or other agreed deadline). Security Deposit Rent under £50,000 per annum five weeks’ rent. Rent £50,000 or over per annum six weeks’ rent. This covers damages or defaults during the tenancy. Unpaid Rent Interest at 3% above the Bank of England Base Rate from the due date until paid. Not charged until rent is more than 14 days overdue. Lost Keys or Security Devices Tenants are liable for the full cost of replacement. Where locks require changing, tenants will cover locksmith, lock, and key costs for all relevant parties. Additional time charged at £15 per hour inc VAT. Variation of Contract (Tenant Request) £50 inc VAT per agreed variation. Change of Sharer (Tenant Request) £50 inc VAT per replacement tenant or reasonable higher costs if applicable. Covers landlord instructions, referencing, Right to Rent checks, deposit registration, and legal documentation. PARKHEATH TENANT FEE SCHEDULE FOR NON HOUSING ACT TENANCIES (Company Lets, Common Law, rents over £100,000, Resident Landlords) Holding Deposit usually up to 2 weeks’ rent, deducted from the first month’s rent if the tenancy proceeds. Tenancy Agreement Fee £300 inc VAT per tenancy. Tenant Referencing £30 inc VAT per tenant or guarantor, £60 inc VAT minimum for students with guarantor or fast track, £75 inc VAT for international credit checks or company lets. Security Deposit usually equivalent to six weeks’ rent and refundable subject to agreed deductions. Higher deposits may apply depending on circumstances such as pets. Check-in and Check-out Inventory Costs usually payable by the tenant at the end of the tenancy. Costs vary depending on property size, floors, garden and furnishing. Approximate range £85 to £300 inc VAT. Missed appointments may incur a charge. Tenants Fees During or at the End of a Tenancy Renewal Fee £90 inc VAT per extension. Replacement Tenants liable for tenancy agreement and referencing fees as above, subject to landlord approval. Unpaid Rent and Returned Payments interest at 3% above the Bank of England Base Rate may be charged from the due date. Client Money Protection Parkheath are members of Propertymark. Independent Redress Parkheath are members of The Property Ombudsman.
